title: Add Kconfig per-module log level controls
description:
Add Kconfig options for per-module log level control.

Add to firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/Kconfig:

  config LICHEN_LORA_L2_LOG_LEVEL
      int "LoRa L2 log level"
      default 3
      depends on LOG
      help
        Log level for the LoRa L2 module (0=off, 1=err, 2=wrn, 3=inf, 4=dbg)

  config LICHEN_L2_LOG_LEVEL
      int "LICHEN L2 log level"
      default 3
      depends on LOG

Then update LOG_MODULE_REGISTER calls to use these configs.
close_reason: Added LICHEN_IPV6_ADDR_LOG_LEVEL Kconfig option and updated ipv6_addr.c to use it. The other two modules (lora_l2.c, lichen_l2.c) already had their log level config options defined and in use. Build verification blocked by pre-existing project issue: lichen module not detected by Zephyr build system.
